_comment: VDI-only overlay. apply_configs.ps1 deep-merges this file's policies.Preferences into the base policies.json when it detects a Hyper-V VM with no real GPU (only Hyper-V Video / RDP Indirect Display / Basic Render Driver adapters). On a real-GPU machine these prefs are net losses (capped fps, software compositor preferred over real GPU, AV1 disabled), so this overlay is intentionally NOT applied unconditionally. See .local/src/installation_scripts/windows/README.md (Firefox section) for the GPU-offload investigation that motivated this split.
